understanding.title: Understanding ROI
understanding.description: Return on Investment (ROI) measures the profitability of an investment.
understanding.formula: It expresses the gain or loss as a percentage of the initial investment.
understanding.roi_formula: ROI = ((Final Value - Total Investment) / Total Investment) × 100
understanding.annualized_description: Annualized ROI allows comparing investments over different durations
understanding.annualized_formula: by calculating an equivalent return per year.

faq.hero_subtitle: Find clear and precise answers to all your questions.
faq.no_results: No questions found for this search.
faq.contact_subtitle: Our expert team is available to answer all your questions.

general.question: What is Continental Bank?
general.answer: Continental Bank is an international banking institution founded in 1985, specializing in wealth management, structured financing and premium banking services for institutional clients and high-net-worth individuals.

general.question: What is the difference between a traditional bank and Continental Bank?
general.answer: Continental Bank stands out through its bespoke approach, premium services, international expertise and commitment to operational excellence. We offer solutions tailored to each client's specific needs.

general.question: How do I become a client of Continental Bank?
general.answer: To become a client, you must complete our online form or contact one of our advisors directly. We will then analyze your profile to propose the most suitable solutions.

general.question: In which countries is Continental Bank present?
general.answer: Continental Bank is present in 18 countries with 7 international subsidiaries, mainly in Europe, North America and Asia-Pacific.

general.question: What is the financial strength of Continental Bank?
general.answer: With total assets of €45.2 billion and a CET1 ratio of 15.8%, Continental Bank enjoys excellent financial health and is supervised by the highest regulatory authorities.

accounts.question: What types of accounts do you offer?
accounts.answer: We offer current accounts, savings accounts, securities accounts, currency accounts and wealth management solutions tailored to individuals, professionals and institutional clients.

accounts.question: What are the conditions to open an account?
accounts.answer: Conditions vary depending on the type of account. For a personal account, you must be of legal age, a tax resident and demonstrate a minimum income. For premium accounts, specific conditions apply.

accounts.question: How do I close my account?
accounts.answer: Account closure can be requested by letter, at a branch or through your online client area. A notice period of 30 days is generally required.

accounts.question: What are the account management fees?
accounts.answer: Account management fees vary depending on the type of account and service level. Our premium accounts include many benefits and services at no additional charge.

accounts.question: How do I check my balance and transactions?
accounts.answer: You can check your balance and transactions 24/7 via our mobile app, your online client area or by contacting your advisor.

credits.question: What types of credit do you offer?
credits.answer: We offer personal loans, mortgages, auto loans, business loans, debt consolidation and home improvement loans with competitive rates and flexible terms.

credits.question: How do I calculate my borrowing capacity?
credits.answer: Your borrowing capacity depends on your income, existing expenses and your debt ratio. We recommend maintaining a debt ratio below 35%.

credits.question: What documents are required for a credit application?
credits.answer: Required documents generally include: ID, proof of address, pay slips, tax returns, and depending on the type of credit, specific documents.

credits.question: What is the response time for a credit application?
credits.answer: We provide a preliminary response within 24 hours and a final decision within 48 hours for complete files. Funds can be released within 48 hours of acceptance.

credits.question: Can I repay my credit early?
credits.answer: Yes, all our credits can be repaid early at no charge. You can make a partial or full repayment at any time.

credits.question: What is APR (Annual Percentage Rate)?
credits.answer: The Annual Percentage Rate (APR) includes the nominal interest rate and all mandatory charges associated with the credit. It enables effective comparison of credit offers.

security.question: How do you protect my personal data?
security.answer: We use AES-256 encryption, TLS 1.3 protocols and strictly comply with GDPR. Your data is processed with the utmost confidentiality and is never shared without your consent.

security.question: What security measures are in place for transactions?
security.answer: All our transactions are secured by strong authentication, biometric verification, 24/7 monitoring and automatic fraud detection.

security.question: How do I report suspicious activity?
security.answer: You can report any suspicious activity via your client area, by phone at 0800 123 456 or by email at security@europakreditbk.com.

security.question: What is two-factor authentication?
security.answer: Two-factor authentication (2FA) adds a layer of security by requiring a second authentication element (SMS code, application) in addition to your password.

security.question: How do I create a secure password?
security.answer: A secure password must contain at least 12 characters, include uppercase, lowercase, numbers and symbols. Avoid personal information and change it regularly.

digital.question: How do I access my online client area?
digital.answer: Log in to our site with your username and password. You can also access your area via our mobile app available on iOS and Android.

digital.question: What are the features of the mobile app?
digital.answer: Our app lets you check your balances, make transfers, pay bills, track your investments and benefit from 24/7 assistance.

digital.question: How do I enable notifications?
digital.answer: Notifications can be enabled in the settings of your client area or mobile app. You can choose the types of alerts you wish to receive.

digital.question: Can I use facial or biometric recognition?
digital.answer: Yes, our app supports Face ID, Touch ID and biometric recognition for fast and secure access to your account.

digital.question: How do I make an international transfer?
digital.answer: International transfers can be made via your client area. We offer competitive exchange rates and fast processing times.

contact.question: How do I contact customer service?
contact.answer: You can contact us by phone at 0800 123 456 (free call), by email at contact@europakreditbk.com, via live chat on our website, or at a branch by appointment.

contact.question: What are the customer service hours?
contact.answer: Our customer service is available Monday to Friday from 8am to 8pm and Saturday from 9am to 5pm. Emergency assistance is available 24/7 for critical situations.

contact.question: How do I make an appointment with an advisor?
contact.answer: You can make an appointment via your client area, by phone or directly at a branch. We also offer video consultations.

contact.question: How do I file a complaint?
contact.answer: Complaints can be filed in writing, by email at complaints@europakreditbk.com, or via the dedicated form in your client area. We guarantee a response within 10 business days.

contact.question: What should I do if my card is lost or stolen?
contact.answer: In case of loss or theft, immediately contact customer service at 0800 123 456 (24/7) to block your card. You can also block it via your mobile app.

loan_calculator.hero_subtitle: Our interactive simulator gives you an instant view of your monthly payments and total cost.
loan_calculator.result_note: This simulation is indicative only. The final rate depends on your file and our credit committee's decision.
loan_calculator.why_us_subtitle: Outstanding advantages for your financing projects.
loan_calculator.feat_1_desc: Best market rates thanks to our privileged banking partnerships
loan_calculator.feat_2_desc: Decision within 24h and fund release in 48h for approved files
loan_calculator.feat_3_desc: Full transparency on all costs related to your loan
loan_calculator.feat_4_desc: A personal advisor supports you throughout your project
loan_calculator.step_1_desc: Use our calculator to estimate your monthly payment
loan_calculator.step_2_desc: Submit your application online with your documents
loan_calculator.step_3_desc: Receive a response within 24 business hours
loan_calculator.step_4_desc: Funds transferred to your account within 48h
loan_calculator.legal_text: This simulation is provided for information purposes only and does not constitute a financing commitment. The final rates and conditions depend on your credit profile and the decision of our credit committee. APR includes all mandatory fees.
loan_calculator.cta_subtitle: Our financial advisors are available to help you find the most suitable solution.

legal_documents.hero_subtitle: At Continental Bank, we do not compromise on security. We operate entirely under the most rigorous financial and physical security frameworks of the European Union.
legal_documents.pillar_1_desc: We operate under strict European Union banking regulations and adhere strictly to the guidelines of major European supervisory authorities.
legal_documents.pillar_2_desc: Your deposits are legally protected up to €100,000 per depositor under the statutory European Deposit Guarantee Scheme (EDIS).
legal_documents.pillar_3_desc: All portal communications and document transfers use AES-256 encryption. We utilize advanced TLS 1.3 protocols.
legal_documents.pillar_4_desc: 100% of our server infrastructure is physically located in Frankfurt am Main, Germany, meeting the highest global standards.
legal_documents.pillar_5_desc: Your personal data is managed with absolute compliance to the European General Data Protection Regulation (DSGVO/GDPR).
legal_documents.pillar_6_desc: We enforce the strict guidelines of the European Anti-Money Laundering Directives (AMLD) ensuring clean financial environments.
legal_documents.docs_subtitle: Access our official legal framework, compliance protocols, and regulatory disclosures.
legal_documents.cta_subtitle: Our compliance and security department is available to provide detailed institutional documentation.

contact.hero_subtitle: Our expert team is available to answer all your questions
contact.opt_1_desc: Direct access to our expert team for immediate assistance
contact.opt_2_desc: Dedicated service for institutional and corporate clients
contact.opt_3_desc: Bespoke advisory for your complex financial objectives
contact.form_subtitle: Fill in this form and we will contact you as soon as possible
contact.success_desc: Thank you for your contact request. Our team will get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.err_message_short: Message must be at least 10 characters
contact.err_general: Unable to send your message right now. Please try again.

_slug__pour_2025_nous_anticipons: Pour 2025, nous anticipons une croissance continue soutenue par notre développement en Asie-Pacifique et le lancement de nouveaux produits digitaux.
_slug__europa_kredit_bank_annonce: EUROPA KREDIT BANK annonce aujourd'hui une étape majeure dans sa stratégie d'expansion internationale avec l'ouverture de trois nouveaux bureaux en Asie-Pacifique.
_slug__siege_regional_pour_asie: : Siège régional pour l'Asie du Sud-Est
_slug__plateforme_pour_les_marches: : Plateforme pour les marchés financiers chinois
_slug__nos_bureaux_asiatiques_offriront: Nos bureaux asiatiques offriront une gamme complète de services bancaires aux entreprises institutionnelles et aux clients fortunés locaux.
_slug__nous_avons_recrute_plus: Nous avons recruté plus de 50 professionnels expérimentés dans chaque marché pour assurer une transition fluide et une compréhension locale des besoins.
_slug__europa_kredit_bank_ete: EUROPA KREDIT BANK a été honorée du prix ESG de l'année, reconnaissant notre leadership exceptionnel en matière environnementale, sociale et de gouvernance.
_slug__reduction_notre_empreinte_carb: Réduction de 25% de notre empreinte carbone
_slug__nos_initiatives_esg_ont: Nos initiatives ESG ont généré un impact positif mesurable sur plus de 500 000 personnes à travers nos programmes communautaires et environnementaux.
